roadmap.rationale: RCA concluded `overdrive cluster init` is a Phase 5 verb shipped early — `serve` overwrites the init cert on every boot under ADR-0010 §R5 (no cert persistence). GitHub #81 tracks the Phase 5 reintroduction.

validation.rationale: Single-cut deletion; bug-context.md is the authoritative design. Lightweight bugfix path (option B) — orchestrator overhead waived per user direction.

steps.name: RED — regression test asserting `serve` is the sole cert-minting site
steps.description: Add a regression test that asserts the invariant: Phase 1 has exactly one cert-minting site, and it is `serve`. The test must FAIL against current code (where `cluster init` still exists) and PASS after step 01-02 deletes it. Choose the cleanest expression of the invariant — recommended shape is a clap-parse test asserting `Cli::try_parse_from(['overdrive', 'cluster', 'init'])` is rejected as an unknown subcommand. A second assertion that `overdrive_cli::commands::cluster::init` is no longer a public symbol is welcome but optional (the clap test alone covers the operator-facing surface).
criteria: A new test file or test function under `crates/overdrive-cli/tests/integration/` asserts `cluster init` is rejected as an unknown clap subcommand.
The test fails against current `main` (proves the bug exists) — verify by running it BEFORE step 01-02.
Test name conveys the regression invariant — e.g. `cluster_init_subcommand_is_not_registered` or similar.
Test follows direct-handler / `Cli::try_parse_from` pattern per `crates/overdrive-cli/CLAUDE.md` — no subprocess.
steps.implementation_notes: Mod-declare the new test file from `tests/integration.rs`. Use `Cli::try_parse_from(['overdrive', 'cluster', 'init'])` and assert `.is_err()` with an `ErrorKind::InvalidSubcommand`-shape error. The test is ALLOWED to fail on this commit — that IS the RED phase. Per `.claude/rules/testing.md` § 'RED scaffolds and intentionally-failing commits', commit with `--no-verify` if pre-commit gates reject the failing test, and call it out in the commit body.

steps.name: GREEN — single-cut deletion across CLI code + tests
steps.description: Delete the `cluster init` verb across the CLI code and tests per the deletion-scope table in bug-context.md. Single commit; no deprecation path; no compatibility stubs; no flag. After deletion, the regression test from step 01-01 must pass. ALL existing tests (workspace-wide) must still pass — including the simplified `walking_skeleton.rs` whose Phase 0 is removed as part of this step.
criteria: `crates/overdrive-cli/tests/integration/walking_skeleton.rs` — Phase 0 (init call + dual-tempdir façade) removed; test starts at `serve`.
Workspace-wide build is GREEN — no other crate references the removed symbols.
README.md is grep-checked for `cluster init`; if found, leave a TODO inline and FLAG to the user (do NOT silently edit README).
steps.implementation_notes: Single-cut per memory `feedback_single_cut_greenfield_migrations.md`. Reject any 'compatibility stub' suggestion per memory `feedback_no_rename_stubs.md`. Architect-owned follow-ups (ADR-0010 amendment, `docs/feature/phase-1-control-plane-core/` DELIVER artefact updates, `docs/scenarios/...` updates) are OUT OF SCOPE — leave them alone. Commit-message shape: `fix(cli): remove Phase 1 cluster init verb` (or similar) with body containing `Refs #81` and `Step-ID: 01-02`. Branch: stay on `marcus-sa/phase-1-control-plane-core`.
